sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Good progress! 5 top-row blocks cleared (cols 27, 33, 39, 45, 51). Now I need to clear the remaining 9 blocks:
- Row 27: cols 15, 21 (2 blocks)
- Row 33: cols 15, 21, 27, 33, 39, 45, 51 (7 blocks)
I know:
- Col 15 (aligned with player) works - confirmed earlier
- Col 21 causes game_over when clicked from bottom row (33, 21)
- Cols 27+ work from both rows
The problem is col 21. Let me think about this differently. Maybe I need to click the top-row col 21 block FIRST, before clicking bottom-row blocks? Or maybe I need to clear bottom-row blocks from right to left, and col 21 becomes clickable only after certain other blocks are cleared?
Let me try clicking the bottom row from right to left: 51, 45, 39, 33, 27, then try 21, then 15.

sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Cleared top row cols 27-51. Remaining: row 27 cols 15,21 and row 33 cols 15,21,27,33,39,45,51
# Test: clear bottom row right-to-left, then try col 21
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 51},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 45},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 39},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 33},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 27},
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
